en.title: Longest word
en.prompt: Generate the longest word possible starting with each letter of the alphabet from A to Z, and include its phonetic transcription and English definition in the output.
en.remark: Fun English learning, randomly listing long words. Due to the unclear condition of the longest word, each listed word will be different every time. Contributed by @lxyntz.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English-Chinese translator②
related.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: English Natural Spelling Teacher
related.remark: Helps you learn English with natural spelling and memorize words by means of root words. Contributed by @sonictuzi.

metaDescription: Love words? Generate the longest possible words for every letter A-Z. Includes phonetic transcriptions and definitions. Try it now.

faq.q: Is the AI's "longest word" actually the longest?
faq.a: No. The AI's output varies each run and doesn't follow OED length rankings. To memorize genuinely longest words (like antidisestablishmentarianism), search "longest English words" lists instead. This prompt wins on random fun, not rigor.

faq.q: How do I change it to focus on medical or legal long words?
faq.a: Change the prompt to "generate long words starting with A-Z in the medical / legal domain, with IPA and Chinese translations." The AI switches to the domain vocabulary (pneumothorax, habeas corpus). Specifying a topic is far more useful than just asking for "longest."
